questions.prompt: A company has developed an online trading platform. The engineering team selected event-based scaling for the platform's underlying resources. choices.label: B
choices.text: Event-based scaling should not be triggered at the 2,000-user frequency.

choices.label: C
choices.text: Event-based scaling should not track user subscriptions.

choices.label: D
choices.text: Event-based scaling does not take resource load into account.

choiceExplanations.C: ไม่ใช่ตัวเลือกที่เฉลยในไฟล์ PDF ระบุ ข้อนี้เฉลยว่า "Event-based scaling does not take resource load into account" ดังนั้นตัวเลือก "Event-based scaling should not track user subscriptions." ไม่ตรงกับคำตอบที่ถูกต้องของข้อสอบต้นฉบับ
choiceExplanations.D: ถูกต้องตามเฉลยในไฟล์ PDF ต้นฉบับ

questions.ocrText: A cloud engineer wants containers to run the latest version of a container base image to reduce the number of vulnerabilities. The applications in use requite Python 3. IO and ate not compatible with any Other version. The containers' images are created every time a new version is released from the source image. Given the container Dockerfile below: FT-.Ct•t IO na:n.py •t : •pythcr.•. Which of the following actions will achieve the objectives with the least effort? Select one: A. B. C. D. Perform docker pull before executing docker run. Execute docker update using a local cron to get the latest container version. Change the image to use python:latest on the image build process. questions.answerOcrText: The correct answer is: Perform docker pull before executing docker run.

questions.ocrText:
Which of the following describes the main difference between public and private container repositories?
A. B. C. D. Private container repository access requires authorization, while public repository access does not require authorization. Private container repositories are hidden by default and containers must be directly referenced, while public container repositories allow browsing of container images. Private container repositories must use proprietary licenses, while public container repositories must have open-source licenses. Private container repositories are used to obfuscate the content of the Dockerfile, while public container repositories allow for Dockerfile inspection.
questions.answerOcrText: The correct answer is: Private container repository access requires authorization, while public repository access does not require authorization.

questions.prompt: A company's VMS that are created using the noncritical application tag are automatically shut down at 5:00 p.m. using a cronjob. Which of the following actions allows a cloud engineer to stop all unresponsive instances with the least effort in case the automation fails?

choiceExplanations.D: ไม่ใช่ตัวเลือกที่เฉลยในไฟล์ PDF ระบุ ข้อนี้เฉลยว่า "Using the cloud provider command line to stop the instances based on tags" ดังนั้นตัวเลือก "Using a Bash script to shut down all instances" ไม่ตรงกับคำตอบที่ถูกต้องของข้อสอบต้นฉบับ

questions.prompt: An independent security researcher discovers a potential vulnerability in a package. The vulnerability could lead to exposure. Which of the following is the first action the security researcher should take?

choices.label: C

choiceExplanations.D: ไม่ใช่ตัวเลือกที่เฉลยในไฟล์ PDF ระบุ ข้อนี้เฉลยว่า "Report the vulnerability to the package vendor's security email" ดังนั้นตัวเลือก "Open a public-facing issue on the vendor's Git repository." ไม่ตรงกับคำตอบที่ถูกต้องของข้อสอบต้นฉบับ

questions.ocrText: An independent security researcher discovers a potential vulnerability in a package. The vulnerability could lead to exposure. questions.prompt: A cloud engineer is creating a configuration standard to be used on all new cloud deployments. The document should include best practices designed by industry experts. Which of the following is the optimal way to complete this task?

choices.text: Download the ISO 27001 certification document and certify the company's deployment process.

choices.label: B
choices.text: Verify the availability of a CIS benchmark for each in-scope technology.

choices.label: C
choices.text: Request from the management team a budget to initiate a SOC 2 attestation.

choices.label: D
choices.text: Invite professionals from the local IT community to contribute to the document.

questions.correctAnswerText: Verify the availability of a CIS benchmark for each in-scope technology
correctAnswers: Verify the availability of a CIS benchmark for each in-scope technology

choiceExplanations.A: ไม่ใช่ตัวเลือกที่เฉลยในไฟล์ PDF ระบุ ข้อนี้เฉลยว่า "Verify the availability of a CIS benchmark for each in-scope technology" ดังนั้นตัวเลือก "Download the ISO 27001 certification document and certify the company's deployment process." ไม่ตรงกับคำตอบที่ถูกต้องของข้อสอบต้นฉบับ
choiceExplanations.B: ถูกต้องตามเฉลยในไฟล์ PDF ต้นฉบับ
choiceExplanations.C: ไม่ใช่ตัวเลือกที่เฉลยในไฟล์ PDF ระบุ ข้อนี้เฉลยว่า "Verify the availability of a CIS benchmark for each in-scope technology" ดังนั้นตัวเลือก "Request from the management team a budget to initiate a SOC 2 attestation." ไม่ตรงกับคำตอบที่ถูกต้องของข้อสอบต้นฉบับ
choiceExplanations.D: ไม่ใช่ตัวเลือกที่เฉลยในไฟล์ PDF ระบุ ข้อนี้เฉลยว่า "Verify the availability of a CIS benchmark for each in-scope technology" ดังนั้นตัวเลือก "Invite professionals from the local IT community to contribute to the document." ไม่ตรงกับคำตอบที่ถูกต้องของข้อสอบต้นฉบับ

questions.ocrText: A cloud engineer is creating a configuration standard to be used on all new cloud deployments. The document should include best practices designed by industry experts. Which of the following is the optimal way to complete this task? Select one: A. B. C. D. Download the ISO 27001 certification document and certify the company's deployment process. Verify the availability of a CIS benchmark for each in-scope technology. Request from the management team a budget to initiate a SOC 2 attestation. Invite professionals from the local IT community to contribute to the document.
questions.answerOcrText: The correct answer is: Verify the availability of a CIS benchmark for each in-scope technology.

choiceExplanations.B: ไม่ใช่ตัวเลือกที่เฉลยในไฟล์ PDF ระบุ ข้อนี้เฉลยว่า "The United Kingdom region does not have virtual machines that meet the requirements" ดังนั้นตัวเลือก "The API for creating virtual machines is being throttled." ไม่ตรงกับคำตอบที่ถูกต้องของข้อสอบต้นฉบับ

questions.answerOcrText: The correct answer is: Decommission the infrastructure.

questions.ocrText: A cloud administrator receives the following text message: "Hello! Plz respond so we can send ur replacement laptop by clicking on this tickt response urgently. Thank you" After the administrator clicks on the message, the administrator sees a blank screen with no graphics and a response code of 200. Which of the following should the administrator do to best prevent future instances of this potential attack? Select one: A. B. C. D. Rotate the administrator credentials. Disable text messaging. Enforce a security policy regarding external links. Deploy a WAF to the network.
questions.answerOcrText: The correct answer is: Enforce a security policy regarding external links.
